parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  ci.id_imagem,
  ci.id_pasta,
  ci.detalhe,
  ci.endereco,
  ci.n_pi
FROM `sheetsintegration-451500.form_checking.checking_imagens` ci
WHERE ci.submission_id = '{{ $json.body.submission_id }}'
  AND ci.id_imagem != 'sem_arquivo'
ORDER BY ci.detalhe, ci.endereco
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM `sheetsintegration-451500.form_checking.users` WHERE LOWER(email) = LOWER('{{ $json.body.email }}')

SELECT id, name, email, role, avatar, status, created_at
FROM `sheetsintegration-451500.form_checking.users`
ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, name, email, password_hash, role, avatar
FROM `sheetsintegration-451500.form_checking.users`
WHERE email = '{{ $json.email }}'
  AND status = 'active'
LIMIT 1

parameters.jsCode:
const { email, password } = $input.first().json.body;
return [{ json: { email, passwordInput: password } }];

parameters.sqlQuery:
INSERT INTO `sheetsintegration-451500.form_checking.audit_log`
(id, user_id, action, entity, entity_id, payload, ip, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $items("Criptografar Senha")[0].json.body.id }}',
  '{{ $items("Criptografar Senha")[0].json.body.id }}',
  'register_user',
  'user',
  '{{ $items("Criptografar Senha")[0].json.body.id }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ name: $items("Criptografar Senha")[0].json.body.name, email: $items("Criptografar Senha")[0].json.body.email, role: $items("Criptografar Senha")[0].json.body.role }) }}',
  '',
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
)

INSERT INTO `sheetsintegration-451500.form_checking.users`
(id, name, email, password_hash, role, avatar, status, created_at)
VALUES
('{{ $items("Criptografar Senha")[0].json.body.id }}', '{{ $items("Criptografar Senha")[0].json.body.name }}', '{{ $items("Criptografar Senha")[0].json.body.email }}', '{{ $items("Criptografar Senha")[0].json.body.password_hash }}', '{{ $items("Criptografar Senha")[0].json.body.role }}', '{{ $items("Criptografar Senha")[0].json.body.avatar || "" }}', '{{ $items("Criptografar Senha")[0].json.body.status }}', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())

SELECT
  submission_id,
  n_pi,
  cliente,
  veiculo,
  nome_contato,
  email_contato,
  meio,
  total_arquivos,
  is_complement,
  webViewLink,
  status,
  rejection_count,
  rejection_reason,
  approval_user,
  approved_at,
  rejected_at
FROM `sheetsintegration-451500.form_checking.checking_logs`
WHERE
  (CAST('{{ $json.body.status || '' }}' AS STRING) = '' OR status = '{{ $json.body.status || '' }}')
  AND (CAST('{{ $json.body.cliente || '' }}' AS STRING) = '' OR UPPER(cliente) LIKE UPPER('%{{ $json.body.cliente || '' }}%'))
  AND (CAST('{{ $json.body.n_pi || '' }}' AS STRING) = '' OR n_pi = '{{ $json.body.n_pi || '' }}')
ORDER BY submission_id DESC
LIMIT 500

SELECT
  submission_id,
  n_pi,
  cliente,
  veiculo,
  nome_contato,
  email_contato,
  meio,
  total_arquivos,
  is_complement,
  webViewLink,
  status,
  rejection_count,
  rejection_reason,
  approval_user,
  approved_at,
  rejected_at
FROM `sheetsintegration-451500.form_checking.checking_logs`
ORDER BY submission_id DESC
LIMIT 500

UPDATE `sheetsintegration-451500.form_checking.checking_logs`
SET
  status           = 'rejected',
  approval_user    = '{{ $items('Webhook POST1')[0].json.body.approval_user }}',
  rejection_reason = '{{ $items('Webhook POST1')[0].json.body.rejection_reason || $items('Webhook POST1')[0].json.body.reason || '' }}',
  rejection_count  = COALESCE(rejection_count, 0) + 1,
  rejected_at      = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),
  pdf_link         = '{{ $json.pdfLink || '' }}'
WHERE submission_id = '{{ $items('Webhook POST1')[0].json.body.id }}'

folderId.value: ={{ ($items('BigQuery - Dados do Checking')[0].json.webViewLink || '').includes('/folders/') ? (($items('BigQuery - Dados do Checking')[0].json.webViewLink || '').split('/folders/')[1] || '').split('/')[0].split('?')[0] || 'root' : 'root' }}

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  submission_id,
  n_pi,
  cliente,
  veiculo,
  nome_contato,
  email_contato,
  meio,
  webViewLink,
  rejection_count,
  observacoes,
  status
FROM `sheetsintegration-451500.form_checking.checking_logs`
WHERE submission_id = '{{ $json.body.id }}'

UPDATE `sheetsintegration-451500.form_checking.checking_logs`
SET
  status        = 'approved',
  approval_user = '{{ $json.body.approval_user }}',
  approved_at   = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE submission_id = '{{ $json.body.id }}'

SELECT
  submission_id,
  n_pi,
  cliente,
  veiculo,
  nome_contato,
  email_contato,
  meio,
  total_arquivos,
  is_complement,
  webViewLink,
  rejection_count,
  observacoes,
  status
FROM `sheetsintegration-451500.form_checking.checking_logs`
WHERE status = 'pending'
ORDER BY submission_id DESC
LIMIT 200

SELECT
  COUNTIF(status = 'pending')  AS total_pending,
  COUNTIF(status = 'approved') AS total_approved,
  COUNTIF(status = 'rejected') AS total_rejected,
  COUNT(*)                      AS total_geral,
  COUNTIF(status = 'pending' AND is_complement = 0) AS novos_pendentes,
  COUNTIF(status = 'pending' AND is_complement = 1) AS complementos_pendentes
FROM `sheetsintegration-451500.form_checking.checking_logs`
